CHANGE ORDER NO 12 SEA VALVE REPLACEMENT
CHANGE ORDER NO 13 FOREPEAK CREDIT
CHANGE ORDER NO 14 SKEG GAS FREE AND INERTION
CHANGE ORDER NO 15 CRANE WEIGHT TEST
CHANGE ORDER NO 16 FLANGE BEARING ADAPTER PLATE&RUDDER STOCK
CHANGE ORDER NO 17 SEWAGE TANK GAS FREE AND VALVE INSTALL
